detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 專業實習 (Internship)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Gaining practical work experience on a variety of internship programs in two locations (Shian-An Elementary School, Gin-Ning high School). These opportunities are related to teaching English while others reach into prospective career areas.  


2.教學綱要
This course is designed to help students develop their teaching abilities. Students will learn to apply theories from the teaching methods into real classroom teaching; they will gain skills and insights through class discussion, lesson plan, reflection, and portfolios.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations by the adviser as well as the employers assigned will account for 50% of the final grade, respectively. 
1. Students receive the credit for being on-time and maintaining faithful attendance. In this course, one percentage point out of the maximum of 30 points will be deducted for each period of your practicum missed. 2. 15 minutes late for the practicum will be deducted 0.5 point. 25 minutes late for the class will be considered missing one class. 3. This course requires a lot of practices to improve your career-oriented skills. You will earn your credits of participation through tasks requested by mentor. Performance Evaluation will also be graded by the mentor. 
If there are special and unusual reasons for extended absence from the mentor must be notified in advance with documented evidence explaining the reason for the absences.
